mapper.insert: insert ignore into sys_notification_read (notification_id, user_id, user_type, read_time, create_time) values (#{notificationId}, #{userId}, #{userType}, now(), now())

insert ignore into sys_notification_read (notification_id, user_id, user_type, read_time, create_time) select n.id, #{userId}, #{userType}, now(), now() from sys_notification n where n.status = '0' and ( (n.scope = 'user' and n.user_id = #{userId} and n.user_type = #{userType}) or n.scope = 'all' ) and not exists ( select 1 from sys_notification_read r where r.notification_id = n.id and r.user_id = #{userId} and r.user_type = #{userType} )
